title: ctenopteris rufidula
intro: Ctenopteris rufidula is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the maidenhair ferns. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris rufidula include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to treat skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health and to soothe skin irritations.
